scripts.dev: concurrently -n "web,server" -c "blue,green" "bun run --cwd apps/web dev" "bun run --cwd apps/server dev"
scripts.lint: bun run --cwd apps/web lint && bun run --cwd packages/shared lint && bun run --cwd packages/contracts lint
scripts.format: bun run --cwd apps/web format && bun run --cwd apps/desktop format && bun run --cwd packages/shared format && bun run --cwd packages/contracts format
scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd apps/web typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/shared typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/contracts typecheck
scripts.validate: bun lint && bun typecheck && bun run server:test
